zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Bassett於1181年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Sir Alan Basset26歲，母親Aline de Gai22歲。她和Ingelram Le Waleys至少有1個兒子。她去世於1287年5月4日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年106歲。

zh-hans.Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰多瑟特普爾貝可
zh-hans.High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆
zh-hans.Headington, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏愛丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Bassett于1181年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Sir Alan Basset26岁，母亲Aline de Gai22岁。她和Ingelram Le Waleys至少有1个儿子。她去世于1287年5月4日在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年106岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Bassett was born in 1181, in Somerset, England, her father, Sir Alan Basset, was 26 and her mother, Aline de Gai, was 22. She had at least 1 son with Ingelram Le Waleys. She died on 4 May 1287, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 106.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Bassett est née en 1181, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Basset, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Aline de Gai, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ingelram Le Waleys. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1287, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 106 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Bassett 1181 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan Basset 26 und ihre Mutter Aline de Gai 22. Sie hatte mit Ingelram Le Waleys mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1287 im Alter von 106 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Bassett è nata il nel 1181 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Alan Basset, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Aline de Gai, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ingelram Le Waleys. Morì il 4 maggio 1287, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 106 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Bassettが1181年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは26歳，母Aline de Gaiは22歳であった。彼女はIngelram Le Waleysとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1287年5月4日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで106歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Bassett(이)가 1181년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Ingelram Le Waleys(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 106세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Bassett nasceu em 1181, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Basset, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Gai, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ingelram Le Waleys. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1287, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 106 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Bassett родилась в 1181 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ingelram Le Waleys. Она умерла 4 мая 1287 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 106 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Bassett nació en 1181, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Basset, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Aline de Gai, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ingelram Le Waleys. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1287, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 106 años.
